info.name: WarnetGaming API (Advanced)
info.description:
Complete Postman collection for WarnetGaming REST API.

## Setup
1. Import this collection into Postman.
2. Set `base_url` collection variable to your server (default: http://localhost:8000/api).
3. Run `[POST] Login` first to auto-set the `token` variable.

## Auth
- All protected endpoints auto-inherit the Bearer token via collection-level auth.
- Token is auto-extracted from login response.

## Roles
- `role:admin` — full CRUD on rooms, operators, memberships, food-beverages.
- `role:admin,operator` — payments, pelanggans, gaming-sessions destroy, food-order status.
- `pelanggan` — booking-sessions, food-orders, read-only masters.
